description:
You are a mission analyst for a commercial lunar lander company. Analyze the stability of two low lunar orbits (Sat_Circular and Sat_Frozen) under the effect of lunar mass concentrations using GMAT, based on the Keplerian elements provided in ~/Desktop/lunar_orbits.txt. Use a Moon-centered coordinate system and a ForceModel with the LP165P lunar gravity model at Degree 20 and Order 20. Propagate Sat_Circular until it crashes (Altitude <= 0) or 60 days elapse, and propagate Sat_Frozen for exactly 60 days. Generate an analysis report at ~/GMAT_output/lunar_stability_report.txt containing the circular_lifetime_days, circular_min_altitude_km, frozen_lifetime_days, and frozen_min_altitude_km. Save the resulting GMAT script to ~/GMAT_output/lunar_stability.script.

Login: username=ga, password=password123
